title: menu
text: menu A type of global object that enables users to see and execute application commands in a desktop application. A menu can be displayed as a menu bar, a drop-down menu (in a menu bar or cascaded menu), or a pop-up menu. Related Links global object An object in a runtime library that is available to all components on a given host. Global objects include global ProcScript modules, constants, messages, menus, panels, and messages. Menu Objects Uniface enables you to define menu bar, drop-down menu, and pop-up menu objects for use in Windows applications. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
